violations.description: General employee practices. — --Food employee line cook observed without proper hair restraint.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface Reach-in-cooler and prep cooler 2-door was not cleaned as frequently as required.

Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory in kitchen area was used for purpose other than handwashing. Ice dumped into handwash sink. Dump in wash sink of 3-comp sink when the opportunity comes available.
Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities Floor under cooking equipment was not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required.
